channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ADANIPORTS] Adani Ports Surpasses 500 Million Tonnes Cargo Milestone, Reinforcing its Role in India’s Infrastructure Boom
item.description:
Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd. (APSEZ), India’s largest integrated transport utility and the nation’s leading port developer and operator, announced that it has surpassed the landmark milestone of 500 million tonnes of cargo handled. This achievement marks a defining moment in APSEZ’s evolution and underscores the growing strength of India’s infrastructure-led transformation. The journey to 500 million tonnes is a story of compounding scale and execution, reflecting the increasing scale, efficiency, resilience and strategic depth of its platform. APSEZ remains firmly on course toward its next major ambition of handling 1 billion tonnes of cargo by 2030.

  • APSEZ surpasses 500 million tonnes of cargo handled, marking a significant milestone in its journey and India’s infrastructure boom.
  • APSEZ has built one of India’s most critical integrated transport and logistics platforms, with a network of 19 ports and terminals across India and beyond.
  • APSEZ's best is ahead of it, with a commitment to building not only world-class infrastructure but also a world-class institution defined by scale, service, operational excellence and national purpose.
  • APSEZ remains firmly on course toward its next major ambition of handling 1 billion tonnes of cargo by 2030.
  • APSEZ operates a comprehensive ecosystem of 15 strategically located ports and terminals across India’s west, south, and east coasts, combined with a diversified marine fleet, integrated logistics capabilities, and a proprietary delivery platform.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI PORTS AND SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [RALLIS] Rallis India Ltd Appoints Ms. Rashmi Joshi as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Rallis India Ltd has appointed Ms. Rashmi Joshi (DIN:06641898) as an Additional Director in Independent capacity for a term of 5 years commencing from April 3, 2026, up to April 2, 2031, subject to approval of the shareholders. Ms. Joshi is a qualified Chartered Accountant and Company Secretary with over three decades of experience in various sectors and leadership positions. She has been instrumental in strengthening governance frameworks, financial planning, and business strategy in her previous roles.

  • Appointment of Ms. Rashmi Joshi as an Additional Director in Independent capacity
  • Ms. Joshi's term commencing from April 3, 2026, up to April 2, 2031
  • Ms. Joshi's vast experience in various sectors and leadership positions
  • Her role in strengthening governance frameworks, financial planning, and business strategy

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RALLIS INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ADANIENT] Adani Enterprises' Subsidiary, Adani Agri Fresh, Divests Entire Stake in Associate Company Vishakha Industries
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Adani Agri Fresh Limited (AAFL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Adani Enterprises Ltd, has divested its entire 50% stake in Vishakha Industries Private Limited (VIPL). The transaction was completed on March 31, 2026, with AAFL receiving a consideration of Rs. 13.27 Cr for the sale of its 50% stake (1,46,685 shares) in VIPL. Post-transaction, Adani Properties Private Limited (APPL), which belongs to the promoter and promoter group of Adani Enterprises Limited, now holds 50% stake in VIPL. The transaction has been undertaken at arm's length basis.

  • Adani Agri Fresh Limited (AAFL) has divested its entire 50% stake in Vishakha Industries Private Limited (VIPL)
  • The transaction was completed on March 31, 2026, with AAFL receiving a consideration of Rs. 13.27 Cr for the sale of its 50% stake
  • Adani Properties Private Limited (APPL), a promoter group company, now holds 50% stake in VIPL
  • The transaction has been undertaken at arm's length basis

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [CUMMINSIND] Cummins India Faces INR 32.98 Crores Demand from Dy. Commissioner of Income Tax, Pune for FY 2018-19 and INR 12.84 Crores for FY 2016-17
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cummins India Ltd. has received two rectification orders from Dy. Commissioner of Income Tax, Pune under Section 155(18) of the Income-tax Act, 1961. The first order is for financial year 2018-19 with a demand of INR 32.98 Crores, and the second order is for financial year 2016-17 with a demand of INR 12.84 Crores. The company believes that the demands have been raised due to certain errors apparent on the face of the record. Cummins India is pursuing appropriate remedial actions with the relevant authorities to resolve these issues, expecting the demands to be quashed. The orders are not expected to have any material impact on the financials or operational activities of the company.

  • Cummins India has received two rectification orders from Dy. Commissioner of Income Tax, Pune.
  • The first order is for financial year 2018-19 with a demand of INR 32.98 Crores, and the second order is for financial year 2016-17 with a demand of INR 12.84 Crores.
  • The company is pursuing remedial actions with the relevant authorities to resolve the issues and quash the demands.
  • The demands are not expected to have any material impact on the financials or operational activities of the company.
  • Orders are due to certain errors apparent on the face of the record.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CUMMINS INDIA LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [FIRSTCRY] Globalbees Brands Private Limited Acquires Further Stake in Candes Technology Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Globalbees Brands Private Limited, a material subsidiary of Brainbees Solutions Ltd, has acquired a 30% additional shareholding in Candes Technology Private Limited, a step-down subsidiary of the company. The acquisition was made pursuant to the Securities Subscription and Purchase Agreement dated 31st March, 2022. This has increased Globalbees' shareholding from 62% to 92% in Candes Technology Private Limited. Candes Technology Private Limited is incorporated in India and is engaged in the business of all kinds of electronics, electrical instruments and audio-visual goods under the brand name ‘Candes’. The company's turnover for the last three years is as follows: 2024-25: INR 38.23 Crore, 2023-24: INR 68.17 Crore, and 2022-23: INR 89.62 Crore. The latest financial parameters for the year 2024-25 are: Turnover: INR 38.23 Crore, PAT: INR -18.65 Crore, and Net worth: INR -20.66 Crore.

  • Globalbees Brands Private Limited acquires a 30% additional shareholding in Candes Technology Private Limited
  • Candes Technology Private Limited is engaged in the business of electronics, electrical instruments and audio-visual goods under the brand name ‘Candes’
  • The acquisition increases Globalbees' shareholding from 62% to 92% in Candes Technology Private Limited
  • Candes Technology Private Limited's turnover for the last three years is INR 38.23 Crore, INR 68.17 Crore, and INR 89.62 Crore respectively
  • The latest financial parameters for Candes Technology Private Limited for the year 2024-25 are: Turnover: INR 38.23 Crore, PAT: INR -18.65 Crore, and Net worth: INR -20.66 Crore

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Brainbees Solutions Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [WELCORP] Welspun Corp to Acquire 2.57% Equity Stake in Welspun Mauritius Holdings from Welspun Pipes Inc., USA
item.description:
Welspun Corp Ltd has announced an update on the acquisition of a 2.57% equity stake in Welspun Mauritius Holdings Limited (WMHL) from Welspun Pipes Inc., USA, a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company. The acquisition, initially expected to be completed by 31 March, 2026, is currently pending due to completion of certain procedural and transactional formalities. The completion of the transaction is now expected to be undertaken on or before 30 September, 2026. Upon completion, WMHL will become a direct wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company. The objective of the proposed acquisition is to streamline the Company’s overseas holding structure. Since the transaction is with a wholly-owned subsidiary, there is no impact on the Consolidated Financials.

  • Welspun Corp to acquire 2.57% equity stake in Welspun Mauritius Holdings Limited
  • Acquisition from Welspun Pipes Inc., USA, a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company
  • Expected completion of the transaction on or before 30 September, 2026
  • WMHL to become a direct wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company upon completion
  • Acquisition aimed at streamlining the Company’s overseas holding structure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Welspun Corp Limited | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [OLAELEC] Ola Electric Mobility Ltd Closes Trading Window Until After Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Ola Electric Mobility Limited has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading by Insiders. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. This decision has been communicated to the Designated Persons as per the company's Code of Conduct and will also be displayed on the company's website, www.olaelectric.com.

  • Ola Electric Mobility Ltd has closed its trading window
  • The closure is in accordance with SEBI PIT Regulations and the company's Code of Conduct
  • The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the Q1 2026 financial results are declared
  • The decision has been communicated to the Designated Persons
  • The closure will also be displayed on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HSIL] Hemant Surgical Industries Ltd. Signs Strategic SKD Manufacturing Agreement with Sonomed Escalon, USA
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hemant Surgical Industries Ltd. has entered into a strategic Semi Knocked Down (SKD) Manufacturing Agreement with Sonomed Escalon, USA, a global leader in ophthalmic diagnostic imaging. The agreement aims to undertake Semi Knocked Down (SKD) and further localise for 100% manufacturing in India for ophthalmic ultrasound diagnostic devices. The pricing is exclusive of taxes, duties, customs, or statutory levies, shipping, unless otherwise agreed. The promoter of Hemant Surgical Industries was an authorized distributor of Sonomed Escalon earlier.

  • Hemant Surgical Industries Ltd. has signed a strategic SKD Manufacturing Agreement with Sonomed Escalon, USA.
  • The agreement aims to undertake SKD and further localise for 100% manufacturing in India for ophthalmic ultrasound diagnostic devices.
  • The pricing is exclusive of taxes, duties, customs, or statutory levies, shipping, unless otherwise agreed.
  • The promoter of Hemant Surgical Industries was an authorized distributor of Sonomed Escalon earlier.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hemant Surgical Industries Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [TUTIALKA] Tuticorin Alkali Chemicals And Fertilizers Ltd Closes Trading Window for FY 2025-26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Tuticorin Alkali Chemicals And Fertilizers Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for the publication of audited financial results for the year ending 2025-26. This closure is in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Internal Procedures and Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading. The trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives will remain closed from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and the financial year ending 31st March 2026.

  • Tuticorin Alkali Chemicals And Fertilizers Ltd has closed the trading window for the publication of audited financial results for the year ending 2025-26.
  • The closure is in compliance with SEBI regulations and the company's internal procedures and conduct for prohibition of insider trading.
  • The trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives will remain closed from 1st April, 2026.
  • The closure will last until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and the financial year ending 31st March 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tuticorin Alkali Chemicals And Fertilizers Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [SVRL] Shri Venkatesh Refineries Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Directors and Connected Persons
item.description:
Shri Venkatesh Refineries Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for its Directors, promoters, designated persons, all connected persons and their immediate relatives as defined in the 'Code of Conduct'. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prevention of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and will be effective from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting to consider the Audited Financial Results for the quarter/financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Shri Venkatesh Refineries Ltd has closed the trading window for Directors and connected persons.
  • The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prevention of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after the Board Meeting.
  • The Board Meeting is for the purpose of considering the Audited Financial Results for the quarter/financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The date of the Board Meeting will be intimated in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shri Venkatesh Refineries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
